title: Step by Step Method for Making Graphene
description:
This based on the paper 'Achieving concentrated graphene dispersions in water/acetone mixtures by the strategy of tailoring Hansen solubility parameters'

I use:

416.75mL of acetone
88.25mL of deionised water
1.5g 325 mesh powdered flake graphite

and that is it. You sonicate it for between 2 and 12 hours and what you get out is graphene
